non_material_findings: The public q0 maximum-law defect is diagnosed without rewriting the retained V3 scientific class.
The private package preserves the receiver/source no-smuggle boundary and freezes receiver features before unblinding.
The source computes q from a real OrbitState structure across a process boundary.
The fixed 152 public-noise bound and 456 private signal floor are prospective constants.
Both fresh replicates must pass target/fold, polarity, null, mapping, source-formula, restoration, PMU, and custody laws.
Offline modes perform zero target contact; live execution remains blocked by exact commit, manifest, and authority environment gates.
Controller failure statuses return nonzero and only the three allowed OrbitState result classes can be emitted.
